summary_en: 334,900 shares (2.06% of outstanding) acquired cumulatively for ¥99.99M against ¥100M authorization limit. Latest block: 80,400 shares for ¥22.66M on May 1–26, 2026. Open-market purchase via TSE. Program authorized February 12, 2026 for ¥100M / 357,000 shares (2.2% S/O) through May 31 now concluded.
title_en: Notice of Share Acquisition Status and Completion of Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief:
Lancers Inc. has completed its share acquisition program authorized by Board resolution on February 12, 2026. The program authorized acquisition of up to 357,000 shares (2.2% of outstanding) for a maximum of ¥100 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange through May 31, 2026.

As of May 26, 2026, the company has cumulatively acquired 334,900 shares for ¥99.99 million, representing 2.06% of outstanding shares. The final acquisition block in May comprised 80,400 shares for ¥22.66 million over May 1–26, 2026. The program is now concluded.

The company stated that future acquisitions will be conducted flexibly while maintaining sound financial health and considering cash-flow conditions.
